changes_made: Changed k8s_networkpolicy_inventory_maintained to k8s_networkpolicy_inventory_documented for clarity
Changed k8s_rbac_user_access_inventory_maintained to k8s_rbac_user_access_inventory_documented for clarity
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to maintaining inventories of network connections and user access, which can be managed through NetworkPolicies, RBAC, and audit logs. Naming was adjusted for clarity and to better reflect the documentation aspect of the control.
naming_improvements: Use 'documented' instead of 'maintained' to emphasize the inventory aspect
title: Learn who is on your network - Maintain inventories of network connections
step1_reasoning: The control 'Learn who is on your network - Maintain inventories of network connections' can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that inventories of network connections and user access are maintained. This involves maintaining NetworkPolicies to control and document network connections, keeping an inventory of user access through RBAC, and capturing network activity through audit logs.
